transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Sunrise Recovery Center, I'm Lauren.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi. My name is Mary. My doctor told me I should look into treatment for my drinking. I've been cutting back but it's hard.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: How long have you been drinking heavily?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: A few years. It got worse after COVID.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Are you drinking every day?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Most days. Not always a lot, but something.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Do you have insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, CoreFirst Insurance. Member ID BP74093455, group GRP-852187.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. Do you have any idea what kind of program you're looking for?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Something that works around my schedule. I have two kids.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We have outpatient options that are evenings only.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: That would work. How long does it usually last?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Depends on your assessment. Typically eight to twelve weeks for IOP.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. My doctor mentioned something about medication. Is that something you do?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, we offer MAT. The clinical team would assess that.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Good to know. What happens next?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Someone will call you to set up an intake appointment.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Do you have a rough timeframe?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Within the next day or two.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Thank you.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: BORDERLINE: clinical_screening is borderline 2-3 — agent captured frequency and history, but missed severity (withdrawal, consequences, prior attempts) and the MAT question came from the caller, not the agent. Insurance borderline 2-3 — fields captured but no framing as 'step toward help.' No empathy opening; call was transactional throughout. Next step timing of 'a day or two' is borderline acceptable vs. not.
